since_last: 9% of 100 AI names green; Powering AI leads -1.25%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 9% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.51% · BTC -1.23% · Gold +0.34% · Nasdaq100 -1.62%. 9% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. Powering AI is doing the heavy lifting at -1.25%.

cards.headline: Powering AI leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Powering AI at -1.25%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.31%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ISRG is the standout at -11.64%
cards.body: Leaders: SO +1.70%, SKHY +1.26%, PEG +0.49%, MGNI +0.20%, ETR +0.11%. Laggards: ISRG -11.64%, SYNA -5.66%, AMAT -5.07%, CEVA -4.98%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -3.52% at $126.5
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -3.52% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
